text: my kid licked the shopping cart handle before i could stop him. natural immunity i guess
boss sent a 'quick sync' invite for 4:58pm on a friday. im updating my resume
matched with a guy whose bio said 'fluent in sarcasm' and honestly i should have known
put hot sauce on my cereal this morning. no regrets actually
spent 40 mins at the gym just sitting on the bench looking at my phone
my savings account has the same energy as a gas station sushi roll
dreamt i was filing taxes in a canoe. woke up stressed about both things
the office microwave smells like someone reheated revenge
told my date i was 'emotionally available' lmaooo
my toddler called the mailman daddy today. i am the mailman's biggest enemy now
accidentally replied all with 'lol ok' to the ceo's email. applying to wendy's
karens at school pickup are an undefeated force of nature
i eat shredded cheese over the sink at 2am like a raccoon and i have made peace with it
my therapist laughed at something i said and idk if thats good or bad
every politician is just a hall monitor who never grew out of it
guy at the gym grunts like hes summoning a demon. respect honestly
dating app guy listed his height as 6'1 and showed up looking me in the eye. im 5'4
my kid asked alexa to order 47 rubber ducks and somehow it worked
put avocado on a pop tart. called it fusion cuisine. my roommate called it a crime
i pretend to take notes in meetings but im just drawing cubes
spent $14 on a juice that tasted like lawn clippings and superiority
my uber driver told me about his divorce for 22 minutes straight
kid threw up on me at target. didnt even go home just kept shopping
the vending machine ate my dollar and honestly thats the most stable relationship ive had
coworker microwaved fish again. this is a human rights violation
my credit score and my self esteem are in a competition to see who drops first
dreamt my teeth fell out but they were usb drives. what does that even mean
told my kid vegetables are 'tree candy' and she looked at me with such betrayal
the gym is just adults paying money to pick things up and put them down
tinder date showed up with his mom. she ordered for both of them
i mass delete emails without reading them. living on the edge
my 4 year old told a stranger 'my mommy poops with the door open' in line at costco
every work potluck is just trust falls but with food safety
congressmen should have to wear nascar suits showing who sponsors them
i dip pizza in ranch and i will not be taking questions at this time
my son asked if we're poor because i said no to a $7 lemonade. technically yes
did a plank for 12 seconds and acted like i ran a marathon
my ex changed his netflix password before returning my hoodie. priorities
someone in my office clips their nails at their desk. i hear it in my dreams now
the school bake sale is just a money laundering scheme for pinterest moms
woke up and my cat was just staring at me like she was planning something
guy on hinge said he was 'not like other guys' then ghosted me. exactly like other guys
i budget for groceries and then buy $40 of snacks at target like a responsible adult
my kid drew a family portrait and i look like a potato with legs. accurate tho
tried meal prepping once and ate all five days of food by tuesday
office happy hour is just networking but everyone's slightly worse at it
the parking lot at school pickup is a warzone and im a veteran
dreamt i showed up to work in my underwear but nobody noticed. felt worse somehow
my daughter told her teacher i drink wine every night. its grape juice. mostly
voting is just a yelp review for the government
i say 'sounds good' in work emails when nothing sounds good
matched with someone who had a fish pic AND a gym mirror selfie. the full package
my toddler negotiates harder than any lawyer ive ever met
someone brought a salad to the pizza party. chaotic evil energy
the wifi at this coffee shop has the same reliability as my love life
ran into my ex at costco. we both had the same rotisserie chicken. cosmic joke
my gym playlist is just rage and early 2000s pop. no in between
autopay is the only reason my life hasnt completely collapsed
kid found my search history for 'how to be a better parent' and asked if he was the problem
linkedin influencers are just motivational posters that learned to type
ate an entire sleeve of oreos and told myself it was self care
my hinge date asked me to split a $6 appetizer. i paid and left
teachers deserve combat pay and i will die on this hill
dreamt i was late to a meeting that didnt exist. still felt guilty all day
i use my kid's nap time to stare at the wall and call it meditation
the ceo said we're a family. families dont do layoffs brenda
my air fryer is doing more for my mental health than therapy ever did
i tell people i wake up at 5am to work out. i wake up at 5am because anxiety
bumble guy said he loved hiking. meant he walked to his car once
my kid asked why we cant just print more money. honestly valid question
someone stole my lunch from the office fridge. i hope you enjoy my sadness soup karen
the pta is just game of thrones but with more passive aggression
i have 47 unread voicemails and i plan to keep it that way
my password is so old it could vote
tried to make sourdough in 2020 and the starter is still alive. im not
the guy next to me on the bus is watching a movie with no headphones. full volume
daylight savings stole an hour from me and i want it back with interest
my 3 year old told the dentist his favorite food is 'floor candy'
spent 20 minutes looking for my phone. was holding it
job listing said 'competitive salary' which means they compete to pay you the least
my gym has a guy who does karate between sets. nobody questions it
inflation hit my lunchbox harder than it hit wall street
overheard my kid tell his friend 'my parents are always tired'. brutal honesty
my coworker says 'lets circle back' and i black out every time
ordered water on a date to save money and she ordered the lobster. universe is comedy
i meal prep with the best intentions and order doordash by wednesday
a politician promised to fix potholes 3 elections ago. the pothole has a name now
matched with my coworker on tinder. monday is gonna be weird
my kid used my credit card to buy robux. he has better financial instincts than me
i flex in the mirror after lifting 10lb dumbbells. its about the mindset
woke up at 3am convinced i left the oven on. i dont even cook
school picture day is just a yearly reminder that my kid wont brush their hair
reply all should require a 30 second cooldown timer and a breathalyzer
manifesting a raise but budgeting for disappointment
the only thing my gym membership exercises is my guilt
my uber eats driver called to say he ate one of my fries. at least he was honest
bedtime with kids is just a hostage negotiation with juice box demands
tried cold plunge therapy. it was just being cold and sad but expensive
whoever invented open floor plan offices owes me an apology and earplugs
my dating profile says 'looking for something real' but id settle for a text back
